title: ageratina havanensis
intro: Ageratina havanensis, also known as Cuban ironweed, is a flowering plant native to Cuba and the southeastern United States. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ageratina havanensis include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
